settings.title: BETTER HORSE IN 90 DAYS OR IT’S FREE
settings.text: Put Core Complete to the test. Feed it daily for 90 days. If you don’t see a noticeable improvement in your horse, we’ll refund your purchase price.

settings.heading: What do we mean by improvement?

settings.text:
Core Complete is uniquely formulated to support your horse’s entire body. Most horses live with significant nutritional deficits that compromise overall health, longevity, soundness, and performance because key nutrients needed for 100% health of every body system are usually deficient in hay, grass, supplements, and most feeds. These deficiencies show up as issues with feet, joints, gut, immune strength, skin/coat, body condition, endurance, speed, and mood.

Core Complete includes these key nutrients at optimum levels.

IMPROVEMENTS THAT YOU MAY SEE INCLUDE:

  • More muscular body condition
  • Ability to work longer without fatigue
  • Greater comfort during and after work
  • Faster exercise recovery
  • Greater willingness to move forward
  • Better balance and coordination
  • Enhanced skin and coat condition
  • Faster and better quality hoof growth
  • More focused and willing mood

1. ENROLL IN THE CHALLENGE

To enroll, fill out our ONLINE FORM or email us at sales@corebalanceus.com with:

  • Your Name.
  • Horse(s) Names (Submit one form per horse)
  • Initial photos: Left side, right side, front view and rear view.

2. FEED CORE COMPLETE DAILY FOR 90 DAYS

Use either:

  • Three (3) 12 lb containers (36-day supply each).
  • One (1) 33 lb container (100-day supply).

3. SUBMIT MONTHLY PROGRESS PHOTOS AND PROGRESS REPORTS

Photos:

  • Send four photos before you start the challenge, and then at 30, 60, and 90 days:
  • Photos of horse from both sides, from the back, and from the front.
  • Take photos with horse standing square on level ground at the same angle in the
  • same location.

Progress Reports:
Fill out the Progress Report before you start the challenge, and at 30, 60 and 90 days (the Progress Report form will be emailed to you upon enrollment).

4. REQUEST A REFUND IF NO IMPROVEMENT

If your horse’s condition hasn’t improved after 90 days, email us final photos and the final Progress Report and a refund request. We’ll refund your product purchase.

Eligible Products:

  • 12 lb Core Complete – lasts 36 days for 1 horse
  • 33 lb Core Complete – lasts 100 days for 1 horse

Email Submissions To:

sales@corebalanceus.com

Photo Guidelines:

  • Bright, natural lighting.
  • Horse standing square.
  • Flat ground.
  • Consistent location and angle each time: Left side, right side, front view and rear view.

Refund Terms:

  • One horse per enrollment.
  • Must submit initial and monthly photos and Progress Reports.
  • Refund applies to product price only (excludes shipping).
  • Valid for first-time Core Complete use on that horse.
  • Refund requests must be made within 15 days of completing the challenge.

Campaign Slogan: Your Horse. 90 Days. Zero Risk.

Social Media Caption:

  • 90 days. One supplement. No risk.
  • Join the Core Balance 90 Day Challenge.
  • Feed Core Complete, track your horse’s progress,
  • If there’s no visible improvement—we’ll refund you.
  • #CoreBalanceChallenge #HorseHealth #EquineSupplements #CoreComplete
